productDisplayName: Puma Men Osuran White Sports Shoes
description: The Osuran MN Sports shoe from puma is a lightweight everyday trainer. Inspired by old school running trainers, these shoes look great when teamed with casual wear.UpperSynthetic nubuck and mesh upperPadded tongue for comfortEco-Ortholite footbedFlexible midsole EverTrack rubber sole with deep flex grooves for durability in high-wear areasMidsoleFull-length lateral groove in the midsole to reinforce stability throughout the gait cycleOrthoLite sockliner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleBioRide technology for a more natural and responsive rideEverRide technology to reduce weight and improve forefoot cushioningEverTrack used in the outsole for greater durability in high-wear areasRocker shape of outsole allows for natural stride with an effortless toe-offFlex grooves built across the waffle patterned outsole to enhance flexibility      Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
